title: Modern Torches [1.21+ Torches Style]
body:
# Modern Torches

The Modern Torches resource pack changes the appearance of torches in Minecraft, making them look like the torches from version 1.21.2+. On older versions, it completely replaces the old red torches and others with the new ones.

![New Torches](https://i.imgur.com/aGRABPX.png)

**FAQ**</br>
**Will the resource pack be supported in future versions?**</br>
Yes, it will.</br>
**Can I freely use the resource pack?**</br>
Yes, absolutely.</br>
**Can I modify the resource pack?**</br>
If you want to.</br>
